chapter_title.en: Chapter 116 – Disbursement of the Dirhams coated over

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/319)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/319)
text: كُنْتُ عِنْدَ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فَدَخَلَ عَلَيْهِ قَوْمٌ مِنْ أَهْلِ سِجِسْتَانَ فَسَأَلُوهُ عَنِ الدَّرَاهِمِ الْمَحْمُولِ عَلَيْهَا فَقَالَ لَا بَأْسَ إِذَا كَانَ جَوَازاً لِمِصْرٍ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from the one who narrated it, from Jameel, from Hareyz Bin Abdullah who said,

‘I was in the presence of Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, so a group of people came over to him<sup>asws</sup> from the inhabitants of Sijistan. So they asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the Dirhams coated over. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no problem when it was licenced (currency) in a city’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from those who narrated to him from Jamil from Hariz ibn ‘Abd Allah who has said the following: “I once was with abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, when a people from Sajistan came to him (the Imam) and asked about dirham with impurities. He (the Imam) said, ‘It is not harmful if they currently are in circulation in a city.’”
